name: Extinction Void
short_description: A Roulike top-down post apocalyptic shooter. Fight, upgrade, evolve, embrace challenges, uncover the truth!
detailed_description:
Extinction Void is a Roguelike top-down shooter where players take on the role of the "Super Mutant King." One fateful night, in a dark, ominous house, on a desolate rural road, or within a research facility devastated by a void breach, you find yourself surrounded by grotesque zombie creatures. There's no time to think—only to act. Arm yourself, carve a bloody path to survival, and harness your mutant powers to evolve and grow stronger. As the relentless battle rages on, you’ll uncover the secrets of your own origins and unravel the hidden truth behind this catastrophic void outbreak.

Game Features:

  • Diverse Weaponry: Experience the thrill of raining bullets with submachine guns, the heavy impact of rifles, and the overwhelming barrage of shotgun blasts!

  • Rich Skill System: With over ten active and passive abilities, each skill choice leads to a new combat experience!

  • Variety of Monsters: From long-range shooting zombies to powerful heavy-class undead, each enemy comes with unique traits—different speeds, appearances, and destructive powers, bringing a variety of challenges and excitement.

  • Upgrade and Evolution System: A core Roguelike element! Gain experience by slaying zombies, level up, and evolve to enhance your power!

  • Difficulty Modes: Whether you're looking for a mindless slaughter or a hellish nightmare, the difficulty options cater to all playstyles, pushing you to your limits!

The Void is not just a place—it’s a mysterious and powerful force, waiting for you to command…

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Traditional Chinese
